content:
# Wafr Ratawi Field

**Summary**: A carbonate reservoir located in the Partitioned Neutral Zone between Kuwait and Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] focused on the Wafra-Ratawi field to evaluate VES systems for heavy oil recovery.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] located on the broad anticlinorium of the N-S trending Kuwaiti Arch

## Formations Present

- [[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017]] Ratawi Oolite

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Ratawi field has exceptionally high levels of divalent cations. ([[2017-janjua|Janjua, 2017, p. 19]])
